sql_array: CREATE TABLE bitstrings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, bit1 BITSTRING, bit2 BITSTRING);
INSERT INTO bitstrings (id, bit1, bit2) VALUES (1, '10101'::BITSTRING, '10001'::BITSTRING);
INSERT INTO bitstrings (id, bit1, bit2) VALUES (2, '11100'::BITSTRING, '11010'::BITSTRING);
UPDATE bitstrings SET bit1 = bit1 & bit2 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bit1 & bit2 AS result FROM bitstrings;
